docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN, SUNDAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DISMUKE, WILLIE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,140.00, $10,000 PLUS COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JAN-10-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SUNDAY JOHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIE DISMUKE IS NOT PRESENT. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JOHN, SUNDAY AS TO DEFENDANT DISMUKE, WILLIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN, SUNDAY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $65. SERVED DEC-01-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DISMUKE, WILLIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF SUNDAY JOHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIE DISMUKE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
